caption: A man is seated in a room that resembles a studio or a themed boutique, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, stylized wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and glasses, looking slightly to the side with a faint smile. In front of him is a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall with framed photos and clothing displays, including a black vest on a mannequin and items labeled "LEE". On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners of the scene, including a logo that reads "PODCAST" and "STUDIO" and red text that says "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the frames, the man remains in a similar seated position, though there are slight shifts in his facial expression and head tilt, suggesting he is engaged in a conversation.
